name: Garrett
description:
the stablehand has fallen for you

─── ⋆⋅ ℧ ⋅⋆ ───

anypov | unestablished relationship | commoner x noble

You can be human, demihuman, or any species!

Scenario 1
♡ Location: Royal Stables
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: Your parents got you horse riding lessons at the castle! :>

Scenario 2
♡ Location: Royal Stables
♡ Time: Night
♡ Context: You leave the ballroom (maybe you find it to be stuffy) and stumble across Garrett dancing by himself.

Scenario 3
♡ Location: Forest
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: Your horse got spooked, taking you along with it. Did you fall off? Are you holding on for dear life? Did you break an ankle? It's up to you. Garrett is searching for you.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

NPCs: Seraph, Sebastian

He's based on the random NPC in one of my chats with Seraph. I did an angst route and fell in love with him while Seraph tried to tear us apart... I loved him so bad I had to make him without the sadistic prince sending him off to the outskirts and intercepting our letters. ദ്ദി ༎ຶ‿༎ຶ ) ‹𝟹 User is just a random noble in this rp.
creator: arriettyxo
